content: They really just said you are not worthy of an explanation, went on a random metaphor about how your experience is like a barren desert compared to their lush forest, then called you passive aggressive? Funny.

oh btw, critical point goes on dore, and memory on miryam
I'm probably gonna do that when making a team for people to make it easier for them. Whenever I make my teams, I kinda just know in my head what wheel goes on who <:BLEH:1015453185063784458>
I can explain how the team works though
As someone who only started really learning the PvP recently it helps a lot when people organize it that way
I am the best to ever touch the game
These two ogier cards are OP, you can easily snipe/kill anything on the enemy team
if you want to swap goliath and ogiers positions you can.  Because what you're looking to do is to turn 2/3 kill a vital member of someone's team while still pumping out damage with goliath/doresain
you can do many different ways of just oneshotting someone with the cards such as using battle insight and playing strike cards
Oh that's how Ogier snipes. I never bothered to look into how it worked lol
Can you say where all 4 thingies go

So normally it'll follow this 

Battle insight -> Frontline tactic -> Strikes -> prophecy of oblivation 

Frontline tactic -> ogier Exalt -> Doresain Exalt

Berserk assault -> Frontline Tactic -> Ogier/doresain exalt either or -> whatever else to finish them off
mir can cleanse taunt then you can target down right unit, which in that case would be liz then Celeste
taking away liz cards/wheel will heavily delay the oneshot + celeste will die really fast after liz
I just go for healer first cause it looks like they struggle to heal themselves
True but in my experience it's really hard to not have Celeste just immediately res as soon as you kill anyway
from my smaple pool of literally 2 games
the healer has been ass at healing itself
Celeste is bad at healing herself because her heal also applies taunt to the target
in terms of like comps like that vs snipe, normally celeste can't ult in time by the time that liz is dead, and you can cleanse the taunt with mir.
Thanks I hate it, I've faced this a couple of times its a nightmare... Btw what's your ideal meta ogier snipe comp?

just thinking about the thing with liz is that, I would also want her cards to be gone. Liz can't get her cards back the turn she gets resed by celeste all she can do is get resed. But there's probably times where you would kill the celeste first. I just don't like the idea of giving liz time to set up with wheel and cards if you don't get the kill on her in time
her bleed skill is a nightmare if you dont have sufficient shield/cleanse also
That's fair. I'm just trying to understand the logic to learn better.
Dw, the thing about traphase its a very.. counter meta? kinda playstyle
another thing too if liz loses her WoD since that looked like liz OTK, it's pretty cooked, and if liz has to have ther WoD placed on her the turn she gets resed then her damage is heavily nerfed.
like constantly rock, paper scissors, with tons of varied teams and such
im so scared of losing to some bs

and Gun's cry can work too
It's still braindead to play lily one shot
If you want to climb fast before getting to fight hard opponent
not that simple to manage her hp pool
she can go from 60 to 0% pretty fast
but you dont really want to strike at 60%

hp management + paralyze + entwine + barriers + dispell her charges + fortress + weak
lot of options
and unlike Helot, you cant just rez and press exalt, since it turns into illusions
but, you can  eventually Exalt Celeste to put at 1 hp
Pure white posse to redraw your hand, and pray for Strike to protect, ez game
there is actually a way to have 100% chance to draw strike to protect with pure white tho
if lily is the only dead one, exalt on celeste when you have 0 card in draw pile
so it refill lily's cards into the draw pile, so pure white will draw all of her cards
